reviews.comment:
Buen acceso, baños muy limpios y cómodos. Tiene un pequeño lugar para comprar algo para comer o tomar un café y seguir.

(Translated by Google)
Good access, very clean and comfortable restrooms. There's a small place to buy something to eat or have a coffee before continuing on your way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXOTVqYU5BEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion, son todos muy correctos, es algo que tienen todos en esa estación de servicio. Nunca esta muy lleno de gente, asique se carga relativamente rápido.
Las formas de pago son efectivo, débito/crédito y qr.
Tienen mercado para comprar, aunque no es ypf full.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service; everyone is very polite, which is typical of this gas station. It's never very crowded, so filling up is relatively quick. Payment methods include cash, debit/credit, and QR code. They have a market where you can buy fuel, although it's not a YPF Full store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXLTk3UlRBEAE
